engine_description.description: A brief description of the Neptune database engine version.

exportable_log_types.description: A list of log types that can be exported to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Neptune engine version.

parameter_group_family.description: The name of the parameter group family that this engine version belongs to.

supported_timezones.description: A set of time zones that are supported by the Neptune engine version.

supports_log_exports_to_cloudwatch.description: Indicates whether the engine version supports exporting logs to CloudWatch.

supports_read_replica.description: Indicates whether the engine version supports read replicas.

valid_upgrade_targets.description: A set of Neptune engine versions to which you can upgrade this current version.

version.description: The specific version number of the Neptune engine.

version_description.description: A description of the specific Neptune engine version.
